title: TONIFUL 3D Gold Happy Birthday Balloons Banner with Ribbon Straw, 16 Inch Mylar Foil Letters Birthday Sign Banner Balloon Bunting Reusable for Girls Boys Kids & Adults Halloween Supplies
features: PACKACKAGE INCLUDES-- Totally 15 Pcs "Happy Birthday" letter balloons with 1pcs straw and 1 pcs ribbon. Each letter balloon measurement about 16 Inch.
MATERIAL-- Made of good quality aluminum foil balloons,it is safe, self sealing helps the balloons maintains for nearly 1 week without leaking or losing air.
WIDELY APPLICATION-- Use for birthday, birthday party, wedding, baby shower,outdoor party, home party, celebrations and other on-site decoration.
SUITABLE FOR THE CROWD-- Suitable for decorating the babies, kids, adults birthday party with this lovely 'HAPPY BIRTHDAY' Foil letter balloon banner.
GREAT PARTY DECORATION-- Hang these foil happy birthday balloons banner in the kitchen, living room, or party room and show the birthday boy or girl how much you care!
description: From the brand Previous page TONIFUL is a brand that specializes in party decoration products, we want to help everyone have a surprise and unforgettable party. Whether you are organizing a birthday party, wedding celebration, graduation party or any other occasions, we can provide you with the high quality products you need to ensure your satisfaction. A party is a time for people to get together and share happiness. So bring surprise and joy to the party!
